languages.text: "Правда? Так звали родоначальника моего рода, прадеда. Вам доводилось встречаться с моим потомком?"

traits.locale_text: "Правда? Так звали родоначальника моего рода, прадеда. Вам доводилось встречаться с моим потомком?"

languages.text: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"
languages.original_text: "Правда? Так звали родоначальника моего рода, прадеда. Вам доводилось встречаться с моим потомком?"

traits.locale_text: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"
"Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"
"Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"
"Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"

languages.text: “当真？我家族的创始人便叫昆拉德——他是我的曾祖父。你竟遇见了我的后代？”
languages.original_text: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"

traits.locale_text: “当真？我家族的创始人便叫昆拉德——他是我的曾祖父。你竟遇见了我的后代？”

languages.text: « Vraiment ? Le fondateur de notre lignée s'appelait Kunrad... Il s'agit de mon arrière-grand-père. Avez-vous croisé le chemin de mon descendant ? »
languages.original_text: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"

traits.locale_text: « Vraiment ? Le fondateur de notre lignée s'appelait Kunrad... Il s'agit de mon arrière-grand-père. Avez-vous croisé le chemin de mon descendant ? »

languages.text: "Gerçekten mi? Soyumuzun kurucusunun adı Kunrad'dı. Büyük büyükbabam olur. Soyumdan gelen biriyle yollarınız mı kesişti?"
languages.original_text: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekten mi? Soyumuzun kurucusunun adı Kunrad'dı. Büyük büyükbabam olur. Soyumdan gelen biriyle yollarınız mı kesişti?"

languages.text: «¿De verdad? El fundador de nuestra línea se llamaba Kunrad. Fue mi bisabuelo. ¿Se ha cruzado con mi descendiente?».
languages.original_text: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"

traits.locale_text: «¿De verdad? El fundador de nuestra línea se llamaba Kunrad. Fue mi bisabuelo. ¿Se ha cruzado con mi descendiente?».

languages.text: "Wirklich? Der Stammvater unserer Familie hieß Kunrad ... mein Urgroßvater. Ihr kennt meinen Nachkommen?"
languages.original_text: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"

traits.locale_text: "Wirklich? Der Stammvater unserer Familie hieß Kunrad ... mein Urgroßvater. Ihr kennt meinen Nachkommen?"

languages.text: 「本当に？私たちの家系を始めたのはクンラドという名前でした。私の曾祖父です。あなたは私の子孫と出会ったのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Really? The founder of our family line was called Kunrad — my great-grandfather. You have crossed paths with my descendant?"

traits.locale_text: 「本当に？私たちの家系を始めたのはクンラドという名前でした。私の曾祖父です。あなたは私の子孫と出会ったのですか？」
